mapper.select:
SELECT tb1.DATE , IFNULL(tb2.REAL, 0) AS 'REAL' , IFNULL(tb2.PAPER, 0) AS PAPER , IFNULL(tb2.MONITOR, 0) AS MONITOR FROM ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT 1 AS ORD , DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE UNION ALL SELECT c.ORD + 1 , DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE FROM CTE c WHERE 1=1
AND c.ORD < ${mDiff} + 1
) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE FROM CTE ) AS tb1 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T.DATE , MAX(CASE WHEN DETECT_RESULT = 'REAL' THEN cnt END) AS 'REAL' , MAX(CASE WHEN DETECT_RESULT = 'PAPER' THEN cnt END) AS PAPER , MAX(CASE WHEN DETECT_RESULT = 'MONITOR' THEN cnt END) AS MONITOR FROM ( SELECT sr.DETECT_RESULT
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, count(1) AS CNT FROM SCAN_RESULT AS sr WHERE 1=1
AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY DATE, sr.DETECT_RESULT ORDER BY DATE ASC ) T WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T.DATE ) AS tb2 ON tb1.DATE = tb2.DATE WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY DATE ASC

SELECT tb1.DATE , IFNULL(tb2.REAL, 0) AS 'REAL' , IFNULL(tb2.PAPER, 0) AS PAPER , IFNULL(tb2.MONITOR, 0) AS MONITOR FROM ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT 1 AS ORD , DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE UNION ALL SELECT c.ORD + 1 , DATE(ADDDATE(c.DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS DATE FROM CTE c WHERE 1=1
AND c.ORD < ${mDiff} + 1
) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE, '%Y-%m') AS DATE FROM CTE ) AS tb1 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT T.DATE , MAX(CASE WHEN DETECT_RESULT = 'REAL' THEN cnt END) AS 'REAL' , MAX(CASE WHEN DETECT_RESULT = 'PAPER' THEN cnt END) AS PAPER , MAX(CASE WHEN DETECT_RESULT = 'MONITOR' THEN cnt END) AS MONITOR FROM ( SELECT sr.DETECT_RESULT
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m') AS DATE
, count(1) AS CNT FROM SCAN_RESULT AS sr WHERE 1=1
AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{searchEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY DATE, sr.DETECT_RESULT ORDER BY DATE ASC ) T WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY T.DATE ) AS tb2 ON tb1.DATE = tb2.DATE WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY DATE ASC
